translations.en: !Mariah
translations.zh: !Mariah
雀斑佳人，笑靨迷人。
translations.en: a freckled young lady with an enchanting smile.

translations.zh: 「$T安，$G，妾身有何可效勞？」
translations.en: "Good $T, $G, can I help thee?"

translations.zh: 名字
translations.en: name

translations.zh: 「人喚我瑪萊雅。」
translations.en: "They call me Mariah."

translations.zh: 業
translations.en: job

translations.zh: 「妾身乃@法師議會新進之員。總得有人讓事情運轉得順。」
translations.en: "I'm the newest member of the @Council of Wizards. Somebody has to keep things running smoothly."

translations.zh: 「閒暇時，妾身於@藏書閣鑽研己學。」
translations.en: "In my spare time I use the @library to pursue my own studies."

translations.zh: 議會,法師
translations.en: coun,wiza

translations.zh: 「他們有時太過投入，連@眠食皆忘！」
translations.en: "They get so caught up in their work sometimes that they forget even to eat and @sleep!"

translations.zh: 食,眠
translations.en: eat,slee

translations.zh: 「此等小事於彼輩無足輕重。彼常超脫於@感官之外。」
translations.en: "Such things matter little to them. They often dwell apart from the realm of the @senses."

translations.zh: 投入,超脫,境,感官
translations.en: dwel,apar,real,sens

translations.zh: 「然也。」
translations.en: "Aye, indeed."

translations.zh: 藏書,鑽研
translations.en: libr,stud

translations.zh: 「此乃不列顛尼亞最佳之藏書閣。」
translations.en: "'Tis the finest library in all Britannia."

translations.zh: 「妾身涉獵諸學，唯覺研習古語最為趣味。」
translations.en: "I study many different things, but I find learning old languages the most interesting."

translations.zh: 「由此可窺我等語言之源流！」
translations.en: "One can learn so much about how our own language developed!"

translations.zh: 書
translations.en: book

translations.zh: 半,版,古,銀,譯
translations.en: half,tabl,anci,silv,deci

translations.zh: 「妾身這塊銀版乃在酒館中向幾名吉普賽人所得。」
translations.en: "I got my piece of the tablet from some gypsies whom I met at a pub."

translations.zh: 「或可問彼等另一塊在何處。」
translations.en: "Mayhap they can tell thee where to look for the other piece."

translations.zh: 「將兩塊銀版皆帶來，妾身自當盡言相告。」
translations.en: "Bring both pieces of the tablet here and I will tell thee what I can."

translations.zh: 別
translations.en: bye

translations.zh: 「珍重別矣。」
translations.en: "Fare thee well."

translations.zh: 「此事妾身無能為力。」
translations.en: "I cannot help thee with that."

translations.zh: 「妾身須兩塊銀版皆備，方能再告汝詳情。」
translations.en: "I must have both halves of the tablet before I can tell you any more."

translations.zh: 「此塊銀版妾身已持有多時，能習者皆已盡學。」
translations.en: "This piece I have had for quite some time, and I've learned all I can from it."

translations.zh: 「啊，汝已尋得銀版餘塊！且自妾書房取另一塊一同攜來。」
translations.en: "Ah, thou hast found the rest of the tablet! Go get the other half from my study and bring it here."

translations.zh: 「兩塊合一，妾身當能告汝更多。」
translations.en: "With the two of them together I should be able to tell you more."

translations.zh: 「尼斯托傳信於妾身，言汝持有一冊異語之書。」
translations.en: "Nystul sent word to me that thou hast a book written in a strange tongue."

translations.zh: 「妾身不介意為汝一看……」
translations.en: "I'd not mind looking at it for thee..."

translations.zh: 「然若汝願將其攜來此處，事必更易！」
translations.en: "But I'd find the task much easier if thou wouldst bring it here!"

translations.zh: 「妾樂為汝一觀。」她端詳此書。
translations.en: "I'd be glad to look at it for thee." She examines the book.

translations.zh: 「噢！此種字體妾曾見過！」
translations.en: "Oh! I've seen this script before!"

translations.zh: 「妾身書房中藏有一塊古銀版之半，其上以我等之語與此字並書。」
translations.en: "I have part of an ancient silver tablet in my study with writing both in our language and this."

translations.zh: 「妾身研之所得僅微，唯能辨少數字句。」
translations.en: "I have learned only a little from studying it, but I can make out a few words."

translations.zh: 「題曰『預言之書』，內中提及『吾界之終末』。」
translations.en: "The title is 'The Book of Prophecies,' and it says something about 'the end of our world.'"

translations.zh: 「若妾身得另半塊@銀版，或可破譯此書其餘之文。」
translations.en: "If only I had the other half of the @tablet, perhaps I'd be able to decipher the rest of the book."

translations.zh: 「兩塊銀版俱在，妾身當能譯出全文。」
translations.en: "With both pieces of the tablet, I should be able to work out a translation."

translations.zh: 她細觀銀版良久，便自書中遲疑誦讀。
translations.en: She studies the tablet for a while, and then starts reading, haltingly, from the book.

translations.zh: 古之預言述及末日，言吾界終亡之時。
translations.en: An ancient prophecy tells of the final days, when the end of our world shall come.

translations.zh: 三兆將先於末日而現。
translations.en: Three signs will precede the end.

translations.zh: *大惡之徒將三度降臨吾境，由此可知末日已近。
translations.en: *Thrice shall a being of great evil come unto our land, and by this it shall be known that the end is nigh.

translations.zh: 此惡乃他族之徒，彼族奉此惡為大先知。
translations.en: This evil one is of another race, who consider the evil one a great prophet.

translations.zh: 然此偽先知未循克制、熱情與勤勉三原則。
translations.en: Yet this false prophet follows not the principles of Control, Passion and Diligence.

translations.zh: 某日偽先知將至，污瀆吾族至聖之聖壇。
translations.en: One day the false prophet will come and desecrate our most holy shrine.

translations.zh: 偽先知並將盜走吾族至聖之物，終極智慧守則之書。
translations.en: And the false prophet will steal our most holy artifact, the Codex of Ultimate Wisdom.

translations.zh: 是為末日之首兆。
translations.en: This shall be the first sign of the end.

translations.zh: 經文又載，偽先知將下入大地深淵。
translations.en: Then, it is written, the false prophet shall descend deep into the bowels of the earth.

translations.zh: 偽先知將使幽冥界傾頹。
translations.en: And the false prophet will cause the underworld to collapse.

translations.zh: 由此巨震將裂吾界於兩半，瘟疫與飢荒亦將降臨。*
translations.en: This will cause great earthquakes to tear our world asunder, and there will be a time of plague and famine.*

translations.zh: 是為末日之第二兆。
translations.en: This shall be the second sign of the end.

translations.zh: 偽先知將再度降臨，此為最末一次。
translations.en: One last time shall the false prophet come.

translations.zh: 此次偽先知將率一隊戰士同來。
translations.en: This time, the false prophet will come with a band of warriors.

translations.zh: 彼等將盡滅魔像族之遺民。
translations.en: And they will destroy all that remains of the gargoyle race.

translations.zh: 唯有一法可避此預言之應驗：
translations.en: There is only one way that this prophecy may be averted:

translations.zh: 唯以偽先知為犧牲耳。
translations.en: That is by the sacrifice of the false prophet.

translations.zh: 瑪萊雅頓首良久，深陷沉思。
translations.en: Mariah pauses for a while, deep in thought.

translations.zh: 「彼言『偽先知』，所指必為汝。」她說。
translations.en: "When they refer to 'the false prophet,' they must mean you." she says.

translations.zh: 「依彼族之見，似有理由視汝為惡。」
translations.en: "It would seem that they have reason to think you evil, from their perspective."

translations.zh: 「此事甚難了結。妾身以為汝宜再尋些訊息。」
translations.en: "This is a difficult matter to resolve. I think you'd better seek out more information."

translations.zh: 「沙漠之中有一魔像名喚辛弗拉，通曉我等之語。」
translations.en: "There's a gargoyle named Sin'Vraal living out in the desert. He speaks our language."

translations.zh: 「或可問他關於此書，及魔像族如何看待我等之事。」
translations.en: "Perhaps he could tell you more about this book, and of how the gargoyles view us."

translations.zh: 「歉令汝奔波，唯妾身僅得助通曉法術之人。」
translations.en: "I'm sorry to put you to the trouble, but I'm only supposed to help those who know the ways of magic."

translations.zh: 「故妾身須問汝一題以試之……」
translations.en: "So I have to ask you a question to test you..."

translations.zh: 「魔法音節『Zu』為何意？」
translations.en: "What does the magic syllable 'Zu' mean?"

translations.zh: 眠
translations.en: slee

translations.zh: 別
translations.en: bye

translations.zh: 「非也，並非如此。汝可有典籍以資查照？」*
translations.en: "No, that's not it. Haven't you a Compendium of knowledge to draw on?"*

translations.zh: 「魔法音節『Quas』為何意？」
translations.en: "What does the magic syllable 'Quas' mean?"

translations.zh: 幻
translations.en: illu

translations.zh: 別
translations.en: bye

translations.zh: 「非也，並非如此。汝可有典籍以資查照？」*
translations.en: "No, that's not it. Haven't you a Compendium of knowledge to draw on?"*

translations.zh: 「魔法音節『Hur』為何意？」
translations.en: "What does the magic syllable 'Hur' mean?"

translations.zh: 風
translations.en: wind

translations.zh: 別
translations.en: bye

translations.zh: 「非也，並非如此。汝可有典籍以資查照？」*
translations.en: "No, that's not it. Haven't you a Compendium of knowledge to draw on?"*

translations.zh: 「魔法音節『Jux』為何意？」
translations.en: "What does the magic syllable 'Jux' mean?"

translations.zh: 危,陷阱,傷
translations.en: dang,trap.harm

translations.zh: 別
translations.en: bye

translations.zh: 「非也，並非如此。汝可有典籍以資查照？」*
translations.en: "No, that's not it. Haven't you a Compendium of knowledge to draw on?"*

translations.zh: 「魔法音節『Ort』為何意？」
translations.en: "What does the magic syllable 'Ort' mean?"

translations.zh: 法力
translations.en: magi

translations.zh: 別
translations.en: bye

translations.zh: 「非也，並非如此。汝可有典籍以資查照？」*
translations.en: "No, that's not it. Haven't you a Compendium of knowledge to draw on?"*

translations.zh: 「所言不差！且問汝有何見教？」
translations.en: "That's right! Now then, what can I help you with?"

translations.zh: 「妾身建議汝先尋典籍研讀，再來相談。」
translations.en: "I'd suggest you find a Compendium to study, then come talk to me again."

riddles_additions.ref: 魔像族經典，預言世界末日
魔像族版三原則（呼應人類版 Truth/Love/Courage）
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留 Gargish 三 principles 與人類三 principles 對偶

riddles_additions.ref: 魔像族預言中的角色 = Avatar 玩家自己（劇情大轉折）

riddles_additions.zh: Zu=眠 / Quas=幻 / Hur=風 / Jux=危/陷阱/傷 / Ort=法力
riddles_additions.ref: U6 法術音節系統，copy protection 題目來自 Compendium
riddles_additions.strategy: 音節保留 ASCII，意義中譯

translator_notes: Mariah 學苑女學者，自稱『妾』或『妾身』，對玩家『汝』。88 條全 ≤ len。重要劇情：偽先知預言（Avatar 即偽先知）+ 五個魔法音節 copy protection 問答 + Sin'Vraal 沙漠魔像線索。
